attendance.info: Attendance is automatically recorded. Please contact the teacher if there are any discrepancies.

details.summaryDocDesc: Quickly view core knowledge your child is learning.
details.quizSuggestionsDesc: Use these to review with your child at home.

weeklyDigest.title: Weekly Learning Digest
weeklyDigest.desc: Automatic summary based on your child's learning results.
weeklyDigest.summary: This week your child spent {{hours}} hours learning with an impressive average score of {{score}}. They are doing great in Geometry.

milestone1.title: Thinking Foundation & Logic
milestone1.howToHelp: Encourage child to solve logic puzzles or play strategy games with the family.

milestone2.title: Object-Oriented Programming
milestone2.howToHelp: Ask child how real-life objects can be described with 'properties' and 'actions'.

milestone3.title: Automation & Data
milestone3.howToHelp: Discuss how phone apps store personal information securely.

milestone4.title: Final Creative Project
milestone4.howToHelp: Take time to watch child's project presentation and give positive feedback.
